opportunities.title: Canonical interaction spine (recordProductInteraction) writing through the ONE canonical store
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census: 0 runtime callers of moat stack; coverage: no surface calls recordProductInteraction
opportunities.reason: The single foundation every wiring depends on; must exist before any product wiring so products cannot invent their own memory-write logic.
opportunities.proofTest: spine: valid record, invalid product, invalid tenant, invalid case, duplicate/replay idempotent, correction, deletion, retention, schema version

opportunities.title: Resolve memory-store duplication — canonical = Prisma memory-service
opportunities.migrationRisk: med (route spine to Prisma; keep file store for tests only or deprecate)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census DUPLICATED_CAPABILITY #3: two stores, Prisma the only wired one
opportunities.reason: A compounding moat needs ONE durable, tenant-scoped, deletable store; the file store cannot enforce isolation/retention.
opportunities.proofTest: spine writes resolve to Prisma; file store not used at runtime

opportunities.title: Tenant + consent isolation on memory + twin writes (close GOVERNANCE_GAP)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census GOVERNANCE_GAP #2: writes to shared JSON with zero tenantId/consent/org enforcement
opportunities.reason: Compounding memory without tenant-isolation proof is a liability, not a moat (brief §8/§26). Mandatory before estate-wide wiring.
opportunities.proofTest: tenant A cannot read/mutate tenant B memory/twin; case A cannot leak to case B; revoked-data replay prevention; export scoped

opportunities.title: Durable propagation / outbox for interaction fan-out
opportunities.evidenceBasis: brief §8; no durable propagation pattern found for memory/twin/orchestrator fan-out
opportunities.reason: Needed so a customer request is not coupled to fragile synchronous downstream writes; build after the spine + isolation exist.
opportunities.proofTest: at-least-once, consumer idempotency, correlation/causation IDs, retry, dead-letter, operator visibility

opportunities.title: Wire the 3 playbooks → spine → governed memory → twin (vertical slice)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: coverage top-1: playbooks persist structured results then stop; 'Writes to Decision Centre memory' is advertised but not real
opportunities.reason: Playbook engines already emit structured posture/contradictions/evidenceGaps — perfect twin inputs; the smallest complete proof that the loop compounds.
opportunities.proofTest: 3 runs → twin v1→v2→v3; idempotent replay; contradiction preserved; irrelevant signal isolated; provenance; cross-tenant/cross-case isolation

opportunities.title: Wire decision instruments via shared completeInstrumentRun → spine
opportunities.evidenceBasis: coverage top-2: one shared hook unlocks all 11 instruments; they persist DecisionInstrumentRun then stop
opportunities.reason: Single wiring point, high fan-out; do after the playbook slice proves the pattern.
opportunities.proofTest: instrument run → memory+twin; product-specific typed signal preserved (not flattened to prose)

opportunities.title: Strategy Room paid intake/analysis → orchestrated + recorded
opportunities.evidenceBasis: coverage top-3: highest-value session state currently discarded
opportunities.reason: High commercial value; needs orchestrator convergence decision (OPP-19) first to avoid double-orchestration.
opportunities.proofTest: intake → orchestrator → memory+twin; no double orchestration

opportunities.title: Retainer-cycle memory → per-cycle twin update (strongest defensibility)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: coverage top-4: retainer-cycle memory states exist (NEW/REPEATED/DETERIORATED/IMPROVED/STABLE) but not wired to twin
opportunities.reason: Recurring relationship compounds fastest; reuse existing cycle-memory state machine.
opportunities.proofTest: cycle-over-cycle twin calibration; DETERIORATED_AFTER_WARNING propagates

opportunities.title: Monthly Reporting cycle → longitudinal twin datapoint
opportunities.evidenceBasis: coverage top-6; reporting is inherently longitudinal, currently archives PDFs only
opportunities.reason: Cheap, high-compounding; each cycle already produces structured deltas.
opportunities.proofTest: cycle N vs N-1 drift computed + shown; approval binding unchanged

opportunities.title: Custom Reporting scope/version → engagement twin memory
opportunities.evidenceBasis: custom engagement has scope-version + hash binding already (built prior increment)
opportunities.reason: Twin must preserve superseded v1 fact + current v2 (institutional memory).
opportunities.proofTest: v2 amendment: superseded fact + current fact + contradiction + provenance preserved (v1 not erased)

opportunities.title: crossMoatBrief(caseId, editionId) — customer twin × accountable GMI judgement
opportunities.evidenceBasis: coverage top-5; crossMoatBrief unbuilt; the single most differentiated artifact
opportunities.reason: The uncopyable output (Moat A × Moat B); requires a live twin first.
opportunities.proofTest: edition+twin-version+artifact-hash binding; never infers agreement from a read; falsification triggers propagate; not-advice boundary

opportunities.title: Customer decision-integrity trend (bounded, evidence-only)
opportunities.sourceModule: new (mirror GMI DII discipline, NOT mechanics)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: brief §15; GMI DII machinery exists to model on
opportunities.reason: Only vendor scoring the customer's own PROCESS quality over time; deeply sticky. Never scores worth/personality.
opportunities.proofTest: every dimension score explainable from recorded evidence; no fake precision

opportunities.title: Governed next-admissible-move engine (state-derived, not revenue-maxing)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census #7: knowledge-graph + corridor BUILT_BUT_UNWIRED, needed for next-move
opportunities.reason: Governed personalization inside the not-advice boundary; competitors can't do it inside compliance.
opportunities.proofTest: different twin → different move; insufficient evidence → evidence move not upsell; controlled/retired/ineligible handled; no revenue-only bias

opportunities.title: Strategic-twin snapshot read model in Decision Centre (make the moat visible)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: coverage: Decision Centre already a read-only continuity presenter (home exists)
opportunities.reason: A moat the customer can't see is commercially weaker; reuse existing continuity presenter, no second UI.
opportunities.proofTest: authenticated ownership; provenance; no cross-tenant leakage; shows what-you-said/committed/changed/repeated/contradicted/unresolved

opportunities.title: Outcome + checkpoint loop (governed, evidence-quality-classified)
opportunities.governanceDependency: no high-stakes outcome from weak proxies
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census MISSING_OUTCOME_LOOP #1; a twin without outcomes is an archive of intentions
opportunities.reason: Feeds twin + intervention calibration + integrity trend + next move.
opportunities.proofTest: outcome evidence quality classified; no inference of high-stakes outcome from weak proxy

opportunities.title: Enterprise decision-portfolio intelligence (role/confidentiality-aware)
opportunities.sourceModule: new read models over multi-case twins
opportunities.evidenceBasis: brief §21; strongest enterprise commercial opportunity
opportunities.reason: Build only where tenant/org model supports it safely; after isolation proven.
opportunities.proofTest: role-based visibility; case confidentiality; aggregation thresholds; deletion propagation; audit logs

opportunities.title: Behavioural / calendar signal integration
opportunities.evidenceBasis: brief §20; connectors require consent + external data
opportunities.reason: Requires customer consent + a connected external calendar that does not yet exist in the test estate; unsafe to fabricate signals.
opportunities.proofTest: consent gate; evidence-strength label; correctable; no unsupported psychological inference

opportunities.title: Bounded simulation / counterfactual integration
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census: simulation engine BUILT_BUT_UNWIRED
opportunities.reason: Simulation engine exists but eager compute risks the build/request-path budget (brief §34); integrate as bounded runtime read model after perf guardrails.
opportunities.proofTest: every simulation carries assumptions/boundary/uncertainty/trigger/invalidation/version; not a forecast

opportunities.title: Converge orchestrator duplication (orchestrator vs kernel)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census DUPLICATED #4: two orchestrators, double-orchestration risk
opportunities.reason: Pick one canonical orchestration path before wiring strategy room (OPP-07); do NOT wrap one in the other.
opportunities.proofTest: single canonical orchestration path; diagnostics compatibility preserved

opportunities.title: Resolve living-intelligence assembler duplication
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census DUPLICATED #5: two dormant assemblers
opportunities.reason: Both essentially dormant; converge onto whichever the Decision Centre read model (OPP-14) needs; do not maintain two.
opportunities.proofTest: one assembler referenced by the twin read model

opportunities.title: Retire obsolete GMI seed/legacy modules
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census OBSOLETE #6: self-declare SEED ONLY / LEGACY, superseded by DB path
opportunities.reason: Superseded by gmi-data-service.server.ts; retire after confirming no runtime dependency remains (verify before deletion).
opportunities.proofTest: no runtime import of the legacy modules; GMI tests green on the DB path

opportunities.title: Resolve decision-centre adapter duplication
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census #8: duplicated decision-centre adapters
opportunities.reason: Converge on one adapter as part of the Decision Centre read model (OPP-14).
opportunities.proofTest: one adapter path

opportunities.title: Wire product-knowledge-graph as governed next-move input
opportunities.evidenceBasis: census #7: knowledge-graph BUILT_BUT_UNWIRED
opportunities.reason: The estate self-model is the substrate for state-aware corridor progression (OPP-13).
opportunities.proofTest: next-move engine consumes graph nodes/edges without build-time explosion

opportunities.title: Data portability — export / correction / deletion / retention / consent
opportunities.evidenceBasis: brief §25; moat must be insight+coherence, not data lock-in
opportunities.reason: Trust posture is itself a differentiator; ethical-lock-in avoidance.
opportunities.proofTest: export scoped; correction; deletion removes from active read models; retention policy; consent record; audit trail

opportunities.title: Observability for the compounding pipeline (real dependency-chain health)
opportunities.evidenceBasis: brief §29
opportunities.reason: Health checks must exercise real chains, not confirm imports.
opportunities.proofTest: interaction/memory/twin/orchestrator/retry/dead-letter states surfaced; health check hits real deps
